---
title: "Review of UAV based research"
id: material-hs-1
order: 43
summary: "UAV in the advent of the twenties: Where we stand and what is next."
source_url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0924271621003282"
modules:
  - module-introduction
  - module-hs
Goals:
  - module-goals
  - module-goals-hs
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
  - assessment-hs
labels:
  - supplement
  - recommended
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/material-hs-1.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0924271621003282>

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
- [Scientific UAV Hardware](../modules/module-hs.qmd)
